title: Refactor LSP-092 (LSP): Subtype throws UnsupportedOperationException for a base type method.
apply_error: patch applied but produced no net source changes; the LLM replacement was likely identical to the matched text

detected_issue.description: Subtype throws UnsupportedOperationException for a base type method.
detected_issue.reasoning: The `ensurePersisted()` method in `MmapPageIOV1` explicitly throws `UnsupportedOperationException`. This violates LSP because a client expecting a `PageIO` (the base type) would assume `ensurePersisted()` is a supported operation, but substituting `MmapPageIOV1` breaks this expectation by throwing an exception not declared in the base contract, indicating the subtype cannot be used in place of the base type without altering correctness.

fix_logic.rationale: The method ensurePersisted() is a no-op for read-only pages. Throwing UnsupportedOperationException violates the Liskov Substitution Principle because it breaks the contract of the PageIO interface, which does not declare this exception. Changing it to a no-op aligns with the existing behavior of other methods in this class (like recover() and create()) and satisfies the interface contract.
